text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for mental health need 
1 = Screened positive for mental health need 
Missing 

COMMENT: The variables considered for this indicator are SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_2_SUM (which is the sum of 
SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_CD and SR_SPLMTL_MH_2_CD) and SR_SPLMTL_MH_3_CD. This field is “1” if the 
sum of the first two mental health questions is three or higher or if the value of the third mental 
health question is 1 = A little bit, 2 =
